hero.badge: Now protecting SA families · Free to start
hero.headline: Your child is safe online. We made certain of it.
hero.subheadline: The only digital safety platform built for South African families. Monitors WhatsApp. Speaks Zulu. Ready in 5 minutes.
hero.trust: POPIA compliant · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

problem.title: Every global safety tool was built for them. Not for you.
problem.p1: Your child lives on WhatsApp. Not iMessage. Not Snapchat.
problem.p2: Bark costs R260 a month and does not monitor WhatsApp. Qustodio does not speak Afrikaans. Google Family Link can be bypassed in 30 seconds.
problem.p3: SafeNet SA was built for Soweto, Stellenbosch, Polokwane, and every family in between.

howItWorks.label: How SafeNet SA Works
howItWorks.headline: Set up in 5 minutes. Protection that lasts.
howItWorks.step1: Download and log in with your SA number. No password needed.
howItWorks.step2: Scan the QR code on your child's phone. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.step3: Luna AI monitors immediately. Alerts in your language.

features.headline: Everything a South African parent needs
features.whatsapp: WhatsApp monitoring. On your child's device. Private.
features.whatsappDesc: The only platform that understands WhatsApp threats in Zulu, Afrikaans, Sotho and Xhosa. Never transmitted. POPIA safe.

cta.headline: 3.2 million South African families need this. Yours is one of them.
cta.sub: Start protecting your family today. Free to try. POPIA compliant. Ready in 5 minutes.

footer.description: Digital safety infrastructure for South African families. Born here. Built here.

auth.phonePrompt: Enter your South African phone number to get started
auth.phoneHint: We'll send you a one-time verification code
auth.consentDesc: Under South Africa's Protection of Personal Information Act, we need your consent for the following:
auth.agreeAll: I agree to all of the above
